mapper.select: SELECT p.product_name AS productName, s.quantity AS quantity, s.shelf_status AS shelfStatus, s.min_stock AS minStock, s.max_stock AS maxStock FROM stock s INNER JOIN product p ON p.id = s.product_id ORDER BY s.quantity DESC

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(create_time, '%Y-%m-%d') AS date, COUNT(*) AS count FROM inbound_order WHERE create_time >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 30 DAY) GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(create_time, '%Y-%m-%d') ORDER BY date ASC

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(create_time, '%Y-%m-%d') AS date, COUNT(*) AS count FROM outbound_order WHERE create_time >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 30 DAY) GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(create_time, '%Y-%m-%d') ORDER BY date ASC
